title: Session Patcher
description: Fix session profile errors & skulls not loading when using Minehut External MITM Proxy (or any custom session server).
body:
Fix those annoying profile loading errors you get when using **Minehut External Plan MITM Proxy** or any custom session server. 

This should work on **any somewhat recent version of game**, tested on versions of authlib 6.0.52+.

It is recommended to use the `-XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading` startup argument to hide the warning and stop any possible errors that may happen when applying the patch.

Features:
- Gets player skulls working again
- Stops those "Couldn't look up profile properties" spam errors
- Zero config (just drop it in your plugins folder)
- Runs on **any server software** (Assuming authlib is in the default path)
- Super lightweight
